content:
根据查询结果，2026年1月1日的门店营业额如下：

**门店名称：果果爱家**
**营业额：6,361.11元**

这是当天唯一有营业记录的门店。营业额是基于销售记录表(sell_records)中的pro_old_total_money字段计算得出的总和。
thought_process:
GetDatabaseSchema: {'__arg1': '{}'}
DatabaseQuery: {'__arg1': '{"query_type": "execute_sql", "sql": "SELECT mall_name, SUM(pro_old_total_money) as total_revenue FROM sell_records WHERE DATE(yw_time) = \'2026-01-01\' GROUP BY mall_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC"}'}

tool_calls.input: {'__arg1': '{"query_type": "execute_sql", "sql": "SELECT mall_name, SUM(pro_old_total_money) as total_revenue FROM sell_records WHERE DATE(yw_time) = \'2026-01-01\' GROUP BY mall_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC"}'}

content: 找出2026年1月份消费金额最多的三个会员，列举出姓名和消费金额

根据查询结果，2026年1月份消费金额最多的三个会员如下：

1. **周萍萍** - 消费金额：528.93元
2. **lacy** - 消费金额：331.62元  
3. **吴鹏** - 消费金额：323.60元

这些数据是基于销售记录表(sell_records)中2026年1月1日至1月31日期间的消费记录统计得出的。

tool_calls.input: {'__arg1': '{"query_type": "execute_sql", "sql": "SELECT m.name, SUM(sr.pro_old_total_money) as total_amount FROM sell_records sr JOIN members m ON sr.member_id = m.id WHERE sr.create_time >= \'2026-01-01\' AND sr.create_time < \'2026-02-01\' GROUP BY m.id, m.name ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 3"}'}

{'__arg1': '{"query_type": "execute_sql", "sql": "SELECT m.name, SUM(sr.pro_old_total_money) as total_amount FROM sell_records sr JOIN members m ON sr.member_id = m.id WHERE sr.create_time >= \'2026-01-01\' AND sr.create_time < \'2026-02-01\' AND sr.member_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.id, m.name ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 3"}'}

{'__arg1': '{"query_type": "left_join", "table1": "sell_records", "table2": "members", "join_field1": "member_id", "join_field2": "id", "fields": "members.name, SUM(sell_records.pro_old_total_money) as total_amount", "condition": "sell_records.create_time >= \'2026-01-01\' AND sell_records.create_time < \'2026-02-01\' AND sell_records.member_id IS NOT NULL", "group_by": "members.id, members.name", "sort_field": "total_amount DESC", "limit": 3}'}

{'__arg1': '{"query_type": "aggregation", "table_name": "sell_records", "fields": "vip_name, SUM(pro_old_total_money) as total_amount", "condition": "creat_time >= \'2026-01-01\' AND creat_time < \'2026-02-01\' AND vip_name IS NOT NULL AND vip_name != \'\'", "group_by": "vip_name", "sort_field": "total_amount DESC", "limit": 3}'}

{'__arg1': '{"query_type": "group_by", "table_name": "sell_records", "fields": "vip_name", "aggregate_field": "pro_old_total_money", "aggregate_function": "SUM", "condition": "creat_time >= \'2026-01-01\' AND creat_time < \'2026-02-01\' AND vip_name IS NOT NULL AND vip_name != \'\'", "sort_field": "sum_pro_old_total_money DESC", "limit": 3}'}

{'__arg1': '{"query_type": "execute_sql", "sql": "SELECT vip_name, SUM(pro_old_total_money) as total_amount FROM sell_records WHERE creat_time >= \'2026-01-01\' AND creat_time < \'2026-02-01\' AND vip_name IS NOT NULL AND vip_name != \'\' GROUP BY vip_name ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 3"}'}
